stat.title: Error-Assisted Runs
stat.subtitle: Runs scored with an error in the play.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry singles on a ground ball to right fielder José Caballero. Riley Greene scores. Hao-Yu Lee scores. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Ali Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte doubles (18) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Pavin Smith scores. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Jordan Walker. Nico Hoerner scores. Dansby Swanson scores. Throwing error by right fielder Jordan Walker.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio singles on a ground ball to pitcher Ryan Thompson. Blake Perkins scores. Cooper Pratt scores. Christian Yelich to 3rd. Jackson Chourio to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Ryan Thompson.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler singles on a line drive to left fielder Yordan Alvarez. Kody Clemens scores. Royce Lewis scores. Victor Caratini to 3rd. Ryan Kreidler to 2nd. Ryan Kreidler advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Yordan Alvarez.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford reaches on a fielder's choice. Alec Bohm scores. Bryson Stott scores. Gabriel Rincones Jr. to 3rd. Justin Crawford to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 1–0 · Geraldo Perdomo steals (14) 2nd base. Ketel Marte scores. Throwing error by pitcher Walker Buehler.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Huascar Brazobán on the pickoff attempt. Mauricio Dubón scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso called out on strikes. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson steals (7) 3rd base. Taylor Ward steals (3) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher Tyler Stephenson.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran hits a sacrifice bunt. Missed catch error by first baseman Nolan Schanuel, assist to pitcher Reid Detmers. Caleb Durbin scores. Romy Gonzalez to 3rd. Jarren Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Curtis Mead. Anthony Seigler scores.

notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery doubles (16) on a fly ball to left fielder Cooper Ingle. Miguel Vargas scores. Colson Montgomery to 3rd. Colson Montgomery advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Cooper Ingle.

notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Brayan Rocchio scores. Austin Hedges to 3rd. Steven Kwan to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Tyler Mahle on the pickoff attempt. TJ Rumfield scores.

notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone grounds into a force out, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner. Bobby Witt Jr. scores. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.detail: Bot 10 · 7–7 · Mookie Betts reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Edouard Julien. Andy Pages scores.
